raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally complain about the unacceptable handling of multiple disputes that I have filed with your company. The referenced disputes ( XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX ) were submitted between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>, for transactions that were either erroneous or involved damaged/not-as-described goods. 

Despite the disputes being acknowledged and placed in progress, no meaningful action has been taken by American Express. There has been no attempt to contact the merchants involved, no chargebacks have been initiated, and no updates have been provided to me through the online portal or via any other means. This complete lack of communication and effort to resolve the disputes in a timely manner is deeply frustrating and unacceptable. 

Your displayed Estimated Resolution dates have come and gone, and the disputes remain unresolved weeks past the promised timeline. This suggests a deliberate delay tactic rather than a good-faith effort to investigate and resolve these cases. 

If these disputes are not properly processed within the next week, and if I am wrongfully re-billed for these amounts, it will serve as further evidence of American Expresss failure to adhere to its own policies and regulatory obligations. 

If this matter is not resolved immediately, I will not hesitate to escalate my complaint to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ), XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  and any other relevant consumer protection agencies. 

I expect a prompt response and resolution to these disputes. Please provide written confirmation once the chargebacks have been initiated and the disputes have been formally resolved. 

Sincerely, XXXX
